commentary.text: Prediction: Bruno. VAR-bot has Bruno ahead on points and the tiebreak runway, with Norway and Mexico doing actual work instead of just posing for the team photo. Sara is not cooked: Spain and Netherlands still give her a dangerous late-game route. But right now Bruno has the steering wheel, and Sara’s comeback needs more than vibes and a pretty spreadsheet.
